name: multi-company-portal
description: Multi-company login portal that hosts the FinTrack financial app per tenant, with master/staff accounts.
whatsNew: Bank Accounts: new "Balances as of" picker (Today / Yesterday / any date). Pick a past day and the three totals show that day's closing balance, and each bank card shows a "Closing [date]" line.
Your live balances are unchanged — the date picker just adds a historical view.
